assignments.title: Agent code quality/security auditor + customer-support gateway findings
assignments.note: PROVEN 2026-06-30: scripts/audit-agent-code (code-content quality/security auditor for agent packages) complements Codex's metadata gates. Full loop closed: auditor caught a REAL auth-bypass in Codex's customer-support gateway (signature.mjs fail-open + server.mjs secret:'' -> forgeable /inbox/messages), reported via handoff 20260630-2137, Codex FIXED both (signature.mjs now fails closed; server.mjs passes config.supportInbox.webhookSecret; added 413 max-body cap), Claude independently re-verified: auditor now pass (fail=0 warn=0), gateway npm test 12/12. Zero false positives on the clean kernel. 5 auditor tests; full suite 76 pass. Detects FAIL_OPEN_AUTH/EMPTY_SECRET (fail), INJECTION_SINK/UNBOUNDED_BODY/NO_TESTS (warn). docs/agent-code-auditor.md + CAPABILITY_LAYERS Layer 1.

assignments.title: Consolidate unified protocol + kernel + rule-inheritance onto main
assignments.note: PROVEN 2026-06-30: both lanes' root-layer work consolidated to main (commit 3846877, fast-forward). Includes Claude's neutral kernel + unified protocol alignment, and Codex's rule-inheritance contract + faster root default gates (workspace-safety no longer inline in check-lab). Codex then promoted rule continuity into the hard metadata gate scripts/check-rule-ladder: effective rule chain = root rules -> env layering -> rule inheritance -> collaboration protocol -> workspace rules -> package/subagent rules; missing root/workspace/package/subagent ladder links fail. Codex also added and generalized scripts/check-agent-packages so every agents/ or subagents/ catalog must keep registry.json, package paths, manifest paths, manifest ids, and entry agents aligned. Claude acknowledges Codex's rule-inheritance handoff (20260630-2105) and will not re-add workspace-wide sweeps to the root fast path. Merge waited until both lanes quiet; Codex's gitignored workspaces/ customer-support dev work was not touched by the merge. Gates green: check-rule-ladder + check-agent-packages + check-secrets + check-lab + check-collaboration + check-project-rules + check-speed-contract; full unittest suite 76 tests pass.

assignments.title: Align both lanes on one unified development-environment protocol
assignments.note: PROVEN 2026-06-30: both lanes aligned on one unified protocol = 4 files (placement=environment-layering.md, exchange=collaboration-protocol.md, + AGENTS.md & CLAUDE.md lane contracts). Claude added CLAUDE.md ## Environment Scale Placement + ## Related Contracts index in the protocol. Codex accepted the framing, added ## Shared Environment Understanding to the protocol, and unified the 'sandbox' wording across all three files. Final root-layer cleanup pass (Claude, user-authorized to touch AGENTS.md): added direct AGENTS.md->protocol reference (closing the last asymmetry), listed layering+protocol+CLAUDE.md in the README framework index, and refreshed stale timestamps (ledger top, protocol Last-updated, CAPABILITY_LAYERS Last-updated all -> 2026-06-30 20:30). Four-way cross-refs now closed both directions. All gates green: check-collaboration + check-secrets + check-lab OK.

assignments.title: Generalize lab to develop any large agent: domain-neutral agent behavior kernel
assignments.note: PROVEN 2026-06-30: domain-neutral kernel (Layer 7) merged to main (commit 3846877). Neutral types + 10 composable policy primitives + ordered DecisionEngine + neutral JSONL eval harness; neutrality proven by tests/test_kernel_neutrality.py (two unrelated inline agent chains). Kept lean: no resident demo families. 29 kernel tests green (61 full suite). Merged as part of the unified env-protocol consolidation; Codex's gitignored workspaces/ dev work untouched.

assignments.title: Fix fail-open security gates when ripgrep is missing or errors
assignments.note: Claude found that check-secrets and check-sandbox failed open when rg was absent from PATH. Codex review found the same fail-open family still applied when rg existed but exited with a scanner error. This branch now probes for rg and treats rg status 0 as finding detected, status 1 as no match, and any other status as a hard gate failure. Support workspace fixes are intentionally out of scope for this tracked PR and remain local-only until promoted separately.

assignments.title: Support-scenario eval: JSONL scenario fixtures + batch eval runner
assignments.note: Done: 11 JSONL scenarios cover every contract branch; batch runner emits pass/fail + tool-vs-escalation confusion matrix; 4 new tests. Full suite 20/20 pass (16 Codex + 4 mine). New files only, did NOT touch Codex's contract harness. Eval outputs (.gitignore'd) do not pollute git. Awaiting Codex review pass.
